title: How to Reach Modern Coach Factory Raebareli
contentHtml:
Official Address: Office of General Manager, Modern Coach Factory, Raebareli, Lalganj (U. P.), Pin - 229120  

HOW TO REACH MODERN COACH FACTORY, RAEBARELI   By Road : The Factory, is located 4 kms from LALGANJ on the NH-232 and 28 Kms from Raebareli city, is 88 Kms from the historic city of Lucknow (the Capital of the state of Uttar Pradesh). Raebareli itself is around 84 Kms. from Lucknow on the Lucknow-Allahabad NH 24B road. Buses/taxis are available between Raebareli & Lal Ganj. The fastest Route is from Lucknow is via Bachrawan-Lalganj to MCF
  By Train : LALGANJ Railway Station is situated on the "Kanpur Unnao Unchahar Allahabad" Branch line of Northern Railway. Almost all trains running on this route stop at Lai Ganj Railway Station. The Factory site is only 4 Kms from lal Ganj Railway station. By Air : The nearest Civilian Airport is Chaudhari Charan Singh International Airport at Amausi, Lucknow which is around 89 KM. Coordinates of MCF Main Gate : 26°10’48.6"N , 81°00’38.4"E (26.180170 ,81.010655)

**Official Address: Office of General Manager, Modern Coach Factory, Raebareli, Lalganj (U. P.), Pin - 229120**  

_**HOW TO REACH MODERN COACH FACTORY, RAEBARELI**_   **By Road :** The Factory, is located 4 kms from **LALGANJ** on the NH-232 and 28 Kms from Raebareli city, is 88 Kms from the historic city of Lucknow (the Capital of the state of Uttar Pradesh). Raebareli itself is around 84 Kms. from Lucknow on the Lucknow-Allahabad NH 24B road. Buses/taxis are available between Raebareli & Lal Ganj. The fastest Route is from Lucknow is via Bachrawan-Lalganj to MCF  
  **By Train :** **LALGANJ** Railway Station is situated on the "Kanpur Unnao Unchahar Allahabad" Branch line of Northern Railway. Almost all trains running on this route stop at Lai Ganj Railway Station. The Factory site is only 4 Kms from lal Ganj Railway station. **By Air :** The nearest Civilian Airport is **Chaudhari Charan Singh International Airport at Amausi, Lucknow** which is around 89 KM. **Coordinates of MCF Main Gate :** 26°10’48.6"N , 81°00’38.4"E (26.180170 ,81.010655)
